text:
AI is increasingly involved in creative work. It can now generate art, compose music, and even write stories. For example, you can give an AI a few keywords, and it will produce a unique painting or a short poem. Some musicians use AI to help create new melodies or sound effects.

However, this raises questions. Can a machine truly be creative? Some argue that AI only imitates human creativity by learning from existing works. It doesn’t feel emotions or have personal experiences. On the other hand, AI can combine ideas in ways humans might not think of. Ultimately, many artists see AI as a useful tool, not a replacement. It can inspire new directions, but the deep meaning and intention still come from humans.
